summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 21 SEO landing pages for Denim and Poly-Knit fabrics. All pages load correctly with proper URL structure, breadcrumbs, content, internal linking, and CTAs. Footer has correct links to fabric category pages.
passed_tests: Fabrics Hub page loads at /fabrics/ with data-testid='fabrics-hub'
Denim Category page loads at /fabrics/denim/ with data-testid='denim-category'
Poly Knit Category page loads at /fabrics/poly-knit-fabrics/ with data-testid='poly-knit-category'
Individual Denim pages load: 8oz, 10oz, 12oz, stretch, rigid, indigo-dyed, for-jeans, bulk-suppliers, manufacturers
Individual Poly Knit pages load: 180gsm, 220gsm, 240gsm, interlock, jersey, moisture-wicking, sportswear, bulk-suppliers, manufacturers
All individual SEO pages use SEOPageLayout with data-testid='seo-page'
Footer has Fabrics section with links: All Fabrics, Denim Fabrics, Poly Knit Fabrics, Assisted Sourcing
Footer links have data-testid attributes: footer-fabrics, footer-denim, footer-poly-knit, footer-sourcing
Breadcrumb navigation works: Home -> Fabrics -> Category -> Page
Internal navigation between pages works (related links section)
Assisted Sourcing page loads correctly when navigating from CTA
All pages have proper H1 headings with SEO-optimized titles
All pages have Technical Specifications table
All pages have Use Cases section
All pages have Related Fabrics links
All pages have 'Why Source Through Locofast' section
seed_data_creation: No seed data required - static SEO pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: 21 SEO landing pages implemented and fully functional. Structure: 1 Hub page (/fabrics/), 1 Denim category + 9 individual denim pages, 1 Poly Knit category + 9 individual poly knit pages. All use SEOPageLayout component for consistent structure. Footer updated with Fabrics section. All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing. CTAs navigate to /assisted-sourcing.
